narrative:
Delta Two (precinct in Fulton County) has 623 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
